title: Seasonable
description: A mod implementing the features of the new 1.21.5 update plus custom features
body:
A mod implementing the features of the new 1.21.5 update (as of 25w02a) in 1.21.4! Custom features have been added, but are removed in the light version.

# Implemented Features
## Blocks

<details>
<summary>Leaf Litter</summary>
Spawns below trees in the forest & dark forest biomes. 
It can be used as a fuel source in a furnace (smelts about 1/2 an item). 
Leaf litter can be created by smelting any type of leaves block.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Wildflowers</summary>
Spawns naturally in birch forests, old growth birch forests & meadows. 
In the main version of the mod, wildflowers can also be used to brew poison potions.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Corroded Rock</summary>
Spawns in dirt & coarse dirt. 
Exclusive to the main version of the mod.

</details>


## Items

<details>
<summary>Corroded Dust</summary>
Dropped by corroded rock. 
It can be used to brew awkward potions. 
Exclusive to the main version of the mod.

</details>

## Entities

<details>
<summary>Pig</summary>
Pig variants are implemented, however I was lazy and it's just using biome variants via ETF & EMF. 
In the future I may actually put in the work to implement this properly, but I'm not confident yet on my ability to not break the game.

</details>




Please credit me if you wanna include this mod somewhere and don't distribute this mod as yours.

Enjoy :)


2025/1/11
